title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA5-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5 |writer=[[Russ Manning]] |penciller=[[Russ Manning]], [[Brian Snoddy]], and [[Rick Hoberg]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Rick Hoberg]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[December 13]], [[1994]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53784/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_5|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #5}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' places the Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=5 }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5''' was the fifth issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Princess Leia narrowly escapes an Imperial blockade and is forced to crash-land on a nearby planet... a planet that happens to be an Imperial labor colony! There she discovers that the colony is one of the Empire's main sources of volatile megonite moss, a central ingredient in Imperial ammunition. What's worse, Leia is pressed into service by Lady Tarkin, the angry, bereaved wife of Grand Moff Tarkin, who died aboard the Death Star. Now Leia has to find a way to escape from a colony riddled with Imperials, on a planet where a single misstep can kill!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 5
PRINCESS LEIA, IMPERIAL SERVANT |text=During a reconnaissance mission, Princess Leia's ship runs low on fuel and is forced to enter Imperial space. Stranded on a strange world, Leia discovers an enemy that neither she nor the Rebel Alliance knew it had...}} ==Contents== *"[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5}} ===Cover gallery=== File:ClassicStarWarsEarlyAdventures5CC.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA5-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53784/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_5|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #5}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 5 |nl=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|05|Early Adventures 05]]
